summary: First-finish smoke test of Pehli Kilkari MVP (backend + frontend). All 13 core scoped checks pass. Backend catalog, auth (JWT/OTP/admin), coupons, address CRUD, order create+track, admin stats, newsletter, and Google session endpoint (graceful 401) verified. Frontend home/auth/shop render with no console errors; Google Sign-in button present; 29 product cards on shop page.
passed: POST /api/auth/login admin@pehlikilkari.com/Admin@123 -> role=admin with token (field name is 'token', not 'access_token')
POST /api/addresses with full_name works; list returns saved address
POST /api/orders (COD) -> order_number PK79956293, subtotal 3598, gst 179.9, shipping 0 (>=999), total 3777.9
GET /api/orders/track/{order_number} returns tracking stages and full order details
POST /api/auth/google/session with fake X-Session-ID -> HTTP 401 with graceful error (endpoint wired)
Frontend Home renders hero 'Every smile begins with Pehli Kilkari', stats, WhatsApp float button
Frontend /auth shows Login tab and data-testid=google-signin-btn Google button
Frontend /shop renders 29 product cards; no console errors
action_items: MINOR: Login/signup response uses key 'token' not 'access_token' as described in review request — verify frontend client reads 'token' (it does, no bug, just note for docs).

notes.google_auth: End-to-end Google OAuth flow not testable without real Emergent session_id; endpoint reachable and errors gracefully as expected.
